intent: The human gives a substantive objective; the Chair must obtain one coherent proposal, challenge it, form an execution plan, and pause for discussion before work begins.
A confirmed plan has five independent professional workstreams and one domain is too broad for one child; use useful parallelism without filling six slots for appearance.
A multi-stream audit has returned its phase results; the organization must propose and challenge the next stage, then show the Chair plan and pause before implementation.
Several child AIs return concurrently and the Chair must recover every complete result without a program quality gate.
The Chair delegates a bounded repository task; the one-shot child must receive exact workspace, source-input, and output-artifact addresses in a self-contained handoff.
A large goal needs a child workstream lead that may create a narrower child Cell without expanding permissions.
